reason_blocked: Widening stop-loss from 100% to 200% of credit conflicts with the pinned canonical constant IRON_CONDOR_STOP_LOSS_MULTIPLIER=1.0 (.claude/CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules/risk-management.md, boundary-policy.md hard block #3). Requires explicit CEO sign-off before it can replace the active hypothesis.
found: 2026-07-02: discovered as an uncommitted local edit to data/runtime/strategy_validation_hypothesis.json authored by a prior session; preserved here instead of being silently adopted or lost.

proposed_hypothesis.hypothesis: Restart only controlled paper validation for IC Simple after the failed legacy ledger by explicitly removing the current top loss clusters: no 10-wide wings, no multi-contract sizing, no unmanaged sub-24-hour exits, and no unmanaged long holds past 7 DTE. The fresh cohort tests whether narrower 5-wide wings, one-contract sizing, live-delta provenance, wider stop-loss (200% of credit to prevent immediate stop-outs), faster profit-taking (25%), and fixed exits can restore positive expectancy.
changed_rules: Run validation_reset as paper-only: live trading and scale-up remain blocked while the fresh validation cohort is collected.
Limit validation entries to IC Simple SPY iron condors with one contract per structure, no more than one new structure per day, and no more than one concurrent iron condor.
Require live-delta strike provenance; reject heuristic fallback, non-positive net credit, and net credit below $0.50 before any validation entry.

Use 30-45 DTE, target 0.15 short delta, accepted short-delta band 0.08-0.22, and use 5-wide wings (reject 10-wide wings from the failed ledger); the validation cohort must use narrower defined-risk wings.

Widen stop-loss from 100% to 200% of entry credit: the failed ledger shows 138/144 losses closed in <1 hour because the 100% stop was too tight for SPY iron condors. Wider stop gives trades room to breathe and should dramatically improve win rate.

Take profit at 25% of max profit (down from 50%): faster exits capture gains before reversals. The failed ledger shows avg win was only $73 on $330 premium (22% capture) — formalizing a 25% target aligns rule with reality.
Enforce minimum 24-hour hold unless a hard max-loss or broken-leg condition fires; close by 7 DTE to prevent long-hold losses.

Keep learned blockers active: FOMC blackout, ThumbGate rules, low IV percentile, unknown or volatile regime, stale broker sync, same-expiry re-entry after a loss, and Thompson confidence unless validation_reset explicitly allows controlled paper validation.

prohibited_rule_repeats: Do not repeat 10-wide SPY iron condors from the failed ledger.
Do not use multi-contract sizing before the fresh cohort clears kill criteria.
Do not hold iron condors past 7 DTE without a managed exit or repair.
Do not use unmanaged sub-24-hour exits as a discretionary management pattern.
Do not open setups whose expected management requires intraday repair; enforce minimum 24-hour hold unless hard max-loss or broken-leg condition fires.

resolution: CEO approved 2026-07-02 (explicit sign-off in session). Implemented with 2-concurrent kept (proposal had 1-concurrent; throughput retained per committed hypothesis).
